subject: math
activity_templates: A 3rd grade multiplication facts worksheet. A grid of 10 multiplication problems (0-12 facts, e.g. '7 x 8 = __') printed in big clear numbers. {{character}} gives a thumbs up in the top corner. Header reads 'Multiplication Practice'.

A multiplication arrays worksheet. Three cute cartoon arrays of objects (e.g. 4 rows of 5 stars) with a blank line to write the matching multiplication sentence. {{character}} points to the first array.

A multiplication word problem worksheet with 4 kid-friendly word problems (e.g. 'If 6 friends each have 4 cookies, how many cookies total?'). Each problem has space to write the answer. {{character}} reads a book beside the problems.
A skip-counting worksheet supporting multiplication: three rows of skip counting by 2s, 5s, and 10s with cute cartoon icons (hops, steps, leaps). {{character}} is jumping along the 5s row.
